name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement

---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this feature solve, or what use-case does it enable?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like Vigil to do.

## Alternatives considered

Have you tried any workarounds, or are there alternative approaches you
considered?

## Additional context

Links, references, mockups, or any other relevant information.
